But 100d window: WR=31.7% on n=41, -$550 total. Edge concentrated in data >100 days old and has since expired. rule_1782144529_0 already covers BTC+trend profitable subset. Generic boost will amplify losses at restart.

high_priority_findings.action: Validate confidence_paradox_sizing rule on first 20 trades at restart. Track 80-90% tier WR separately.
